mapper.sql: select w.order_id, w.order_no, w.park_id, w.service_id, w.customer_id, w.customer_name, w.contact_name, w.contact_phone, w.room_ids, w.room_info, w.demand_desc, w.demand_images, w.order_status, w.priority, w.assign_to, w.assign_time, w.disposal_content, w.finish_time, w.rating, w.rating_content, w.rating_time, w.processor, w.process_remark, w.next_follow_time, w.remark, w.del_flag, w.create_by, w.create_time, w.update_by, w.update_time, s.service_name, s.service_type, p.name as park_name from biz_service_workorder w left join biz_property_service s on w.service_id = s.service_id left join ics_park p on w.park_id = p.id
mapper.select: order by w.create_time desc, w.order_id desc
order by w.create_time desc, w.order_id desc

select count(1) as totalCount, sum(case when w.order_status = '0' then 1 else 0 end) as pendingCount, sum(case when w.order_status = '1' then 1 else 0 end) as processingCount, sum(case when w.order_status = '2' then 1 else 0 end) as finishedCount, sum(case when w.order_status = '3' then 1 else 0 end) as ratedCount, sum(case when w.order_status = '4' then 1 else 0 end) as closedCount from biz_service_workorder w left join biz_property_service s on w.service_id = s.service_id
mapper.insert: insert into biz_service_workorder ( order_no, park_id, service_id, customer_id, customer_name, contact_name, contact_phone, room_ids, room_info, demand_desc, demand_images, order_status, priority, assign_to, assign_time, disposal_content, finish_time, rating, rating_content, rating_time, processor, process_remark, next_follow_time, remark, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) values ( #{orderNo}, #{parkId}, #{serviceId}, #{customerId}, #{customerName}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{roomIds}, #{roomInfo}, #{demandDesc}, #{demandImages}, #{orderStatus}, #{priority}, #{assignTo}, #{assignTime}, #{disposalContent}, #{finishTime}, #{rating}, #{ratingContent}, #{ratingTime}, #{processor}, #{processRemark}, #{nextFollowTime}, #{remark}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime} )
insert into biz_workorder_log (order_id, action, action_desc, operator, operate_time) values (#{orderId}, #{action}, #{actionDesc}, #{operator}, #{operateTime})
mapper.select: select log_id, order_id, action, action_desc, operator, operate_time from biz_workorder_log where order_id = #{orderId} order by operate_time desc, log_id desc
select order_no from biz_service_workorder where order_no like concat('WO', #{datePrefix}, '%') order by order_no desc limit 1
